content.description:
Generic editor that renders item editing forms from declarative `ui_hints` specifications. Dynamically loads field editor plugins based on the `editor` field type.

## How It Works

1. Reads `ui_hints` from the editor item's content
2. For each hinted field, loads the corresponding `field-editor-{type}` library
3. Renders labeled form fields in order
4. Shows "Other Fields" section for content fields not covered by hints
5. Provides Save/Cancel buttons

## ui_hints Format

```javascript
ui_hints: {
  "content.title": { editor: "text", label: "Title" },
  "content.enabled": { editor: "checkbox", label: "Enable" },
  "content.type": {
    editor: "select",
    options: { choices: ["note", "container"] }
  }
}
```

## Available Field Editors

- [field-editor-text](item://958dd20b-c30d-4eaa-b1f7-d73d2414c390) - Single-line input
- [field-editor-textarea](item://8271c69e-ec45-485b-9233-89efd8b562ab) - Multi-line input
- [field-editor-number](item://beef5317-d6dc-4287-8c6d-de2f0635f5f9) - Numeric input
- [field-editor-checkbox](item://a5e1fd60-8c4c-4cee-a0e0-f060aa75f739) - Boolean toggle
- [field-editor-select](item://c28eeb82-aac7-4bea-9d7b-7d17c1fd73e7) - Dropdown
- [field-editor-itemref](item://bccf2a2b-c750-417e-9d86-b96699cc5078) - Item picker

## Hint Options

- `editor`: Field editor type (required)
- `label`: Display label
- `readonly`: Disable editing
- `placeholder`: Placeholder text
- `hidden`: Don't render this field
- `options`: Passed to field editor (e.g., `choices` for select)
